summary: Exceptional audience tape with crystal‑clear cassette transfer and a magical show highlighted by Shakedown > Franklin’s and the soaring Space > The Other One.
review: Fans rave about this near‑perfect master‑cassette transfer, calling it comparable to any soundboard source and praising its ambience. The performance is described as intensely beautiful, with hot drum solos and standout improvisations on Shakedown > Franklin’s and Space > The Other One. Overall the recording captures a magical night that still moves listeners to tears.

ai_rating.rationale: All detailed reviews (5‑star) praise both the musical performance and the audio fidelity; only two placeholder zero‑star entries add no negative information, leading to a top‑tier rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Master cassette transfer praised as 'astonishingly beautiful', comparable to board quality with superb ambience; crisp, clear mix, no noted dropouts or distortion.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong, high‑energy set described as a 'well house' with a percolating vibe; the band pulled out all the stops for the college crowd and delivered hot drum solos.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His tone and improvisational choices (especially on Shakedown > Franklin’s) are highlighted as superb.
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass work praised during the zenith of Space > The Other One, with 'slides up and down the fretboard' noted.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drum solos described as hot; the rhythm section pulled out all the stops.
